rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions demonstrate a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, improving the text significantly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively flagged uncertainties and provided specific recommendations, marking confidence and missing evidence thoroughly.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed scope without any drift, addressing all requested revisions and additional issues.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content were introduced; the agent identified potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites are traced, minor edits lack annotations, falling short of full traceability for every change.
